zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Eastwell於大約1213年出生在英國肯特易亞斯特維爾時，她的父親William de Eastwell35歲，母親Margerie of Eastwell19歲。她和John De Criol至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1267年享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Eastwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any of several places called Eastwell, such as Eastwell (Kent, Leics).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Eastwell was born about 1213, in Eastwell, Kent, England, her father, William de Eastwell, was 35 and her mother, Margerie of Eastwell, was 19. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with John De Criol. She died about 1267, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Eastwell est née environ 1213, à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William d’Eastwell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margerie of Eastwell, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec John De Criol. Elle est décédée environ 1267, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Eastwell um 1213 in Eastwell, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Eastwell 35 und ihre Mutter Margerie of Eastwell 19. Sie hatte mit John De Criol mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1267 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Eastwell è nata il circa 1213 nel Eastwell, Kent, England, sua padre, William de Eastwell, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margerie of Eastwell, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con John De Criol. Morì circa 1267, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Eastwell(이)가 대략 1213년 영국 켄트 이스트웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Eastwell(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margerie of Eastwell(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 John De Criol(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1267년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.
